servinfo.title: Rear Brake Shoe On-Vehicle Inspection
servinfo.ptxt: Amount of rear brake shoe wear can be checked as follows.

s1.ptxt: Remove rubber cover (plug) (1) from brake back plate.

Through hole in brake back plate, visually check for thickness “a” of rear brake shoe lining (2). If rear brake shoe lining is found significantly worn, inspect rear brake shoe lining thickness as follows.

s2.ptxt: Inspect rear brake shoe lining thickness referring to “Brake Shoe” under Rear Brake Drum and Shoe Inspection:Drum Brake Model .
